use_cases: Display interactive 3D robot avatars on landing pages or product showcases
Create engaging hero sections with 3D animated characters for SaaS websites
Build immersive product demonstrations for robotics or AI-related platforms
Enhance portfolio or demo pages with interactive 3D elements
Provide branded 3D mascots or characters for developer tooling interfaces
ai_summary: An interactive 3D robot component powered by Spline.js that renders customizable 3D scenes with automatic loading states. The component wraps the Spline renderer with React Suspense for lazy loading, displaying a spinner during scene initialization. Ideal for creating engaging 3D hero sections, interactive product showcases, or branded mascot animations on web applications.
